fields.name: feature_open_time
fields.definition: Current feature Kline open_time in Unix milliseconds.

fields.name: decision_time
fields.definition: Prediction decision time, feature_open_time + expected_interval_ms.

fields.name: entry_minute_open_time
fields.definition: Entry proxy minute open_time, equal to decision_time.

fields.name: settlement_minute_open_time
fields.definition: Settlement proxy minute open_time, entry_minute_open_time + 60 minutes.

fields.name: continuity_segment_id
fields.definition: Stage 2A continuous one-minute Kline segment id for the feature row.

fields.name: is_prediction_time_5m
fields.definition: Whether decision_time falls on the configured 5-minute prediction grid.

fields.name: has_history_240m
fields.definition: Stage 2A flag that the feature row has the required 240-minute history inside the segment.

fields.name: has_future_61m
fields.definition: Stage 2A flag that the feature row has 61 future one-minute rows inside the segment.

fields.name: is_model_candidate
fields.definition: Stage 2A candidate flag based on prediction grid, history, future horizon, and continuity constraints.

fields.name: has_entry_price_proxy
fields.definition: Whether the exact entry minute Kline open proxy price is present.

fields.name: has_settlement_price_proxy
fields.definition: Whether the exact settlement minute Kline open proxy price is present.

fields.name: same_continuity_segment
fields.definition: Whether feature, entry, and settlement minutes are in the same Stage 2A continuity segment.

fields.name: exact_horizon_match
fields.definition: Whether entry and settlement rows exist and settlement_minute_open_time - entry_minute_open_time equals exactly 60 minutes.

fields.name: is_valid_proxy_label
fields.definition: Whether exact proxy prices exist, are finite positive, share the same continuity segment, and have an exact 60-minute horizon.

fields.name: is_final_model_label_candidate
fields.definition: is_model_candidate and is_valid_proxy_label are both true.

fields.name: entry_price_proxy
fields.definition: Kline open engineering proxy price for the entry minute; not a real order fill or true execution price.

fields.name: settlement_price_proxy
fields.definition: Kline open engineering proxy price for the settlement minute; not a real order fill or true execution price.

fields.name: future_simple_return_60m
fields.definition: settlement_price_proxy / entry_price_proxy - 1 for valid proxy labels.

fields.name: future_log_return_60m
fields.definition: Natural log of settlement_price_proxy / entry_price_proxy for valid proxy labels.

fields.name: label_up_60m
fields.definition: Nullable binary label: 1 when settlement_price_proxy > entry_price_proxy, otherwise 0; equal prices are 0.

fields.name: absolute_future_return_bps
fields.definition: abs(future_simple_return_60m) * 10000 for proxy boundary diagnostics.

fields.name: proxy_margin_bucket
fields.definition: Configured absolute_future_return_bps bucket for proxy boundary risk diagnostics.

fields.name: proxy_boundary_risk_1bps
fields.definition: Diagnostic flag where absolute_future_return_bps < 1; does not modify the main binary label.

fields.name: proxy_boundary_risk_2_5bps
fields.definition: Diagnostic flag where absolute_future_return_bps < 2.5; does not modify the main binary label.

fields.name: proxy_boundary_risk_5bps
fields.definition: Diagnostic flag where absolute_future_return_bps < 5; does not modify the main binary label.

fields.name: proxy_boundary_risk_10bps
fields.definition: Diagnostic flag where absolute_future_return_bps < 10; does not modify the main binary label.

fields.name: sample_weight_uniform
fields.definition: Diagnostic uniform sample weight set to 1.0; Stage 3B does not train or select weights.

fields.name: sample_weight_margin
fields.definition: Diagnostic margin-based weight clipped from absolute_future_return_bps; use in later experiments only after rolling validation.

notes: Stage 3B uses Kline open only as an engineering proxy price, not as a real order fill or true execution price.
The proxy was validated only in the 2022-09-02 to 2022-09-04 agg trades overlap window of about 66.77 hours.
Stage 3A found about 98.23% overall agreement between Kline open and first-5-second VWAP labels, with differences concentrated below 5 bps absolute 60-minute return.
Do not assume 2017-2026 all have exactly the same proxy error.
No field in this Stage 3B output is allowed directly into a model feature matrix.
